meta.name: viewport
meta.title: Brookings - Quality. Independence. Impact.

meta.name: description
meta.content: The Brookings Institution is a nonprofit public policy organization based in Washington, DC. Our mission is to conduct in-depth research that leads to new ideas for solving problems facing society at the local, national and global level.

The Brookings Institution is a nonprofit public policy organization based in Washington, DC. Our mission is to conduct in-depth research that leads to new ideas for solving problems facing society at the local, national and global level.

meta.script: {"@context":"https://schema.org","@graph":[{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.brookings.edu/","url":"https://www.brookings.edu/","name":"Brookings - Quality. Independence. Impact.","isPartOf":{"@id":"https://www.brookings.edu/#website"},"datePublished":"2023-05-07T17:44:55+00:00","dateModified":"2026-02-23T19:03:08+00:00","description":"The Brookings Institution is a nonprofit public policy organization based in Washington, DC. Our mission is to conduct in-depth research that leads to new ideas for solving problems facing society at the local, national and global level.","breadcrumb":{"@id":"https://www.brookings.edu/#breadcrumb"},"inLanguage":"en-US","potentialAction":[{"@type":"ReadAction","target":["https://www.brookings.edu/"]}]},{"@type":"BreadcrumbList","@id":"https://www.brookings.edu/#breadcrumb","itemListElement":[{"@type":"ListItem","position":1,"name":"Home"}]},{"@type":"WebSite","@id":"https://www.brookings.edu/#website","url":"https://www.brookings.edu/","name":"Brookings","description":"","potentialAction":[{"@type":"SearchAction","target":{"@type":"EntryPoint","urlTemplate":"https://www.brookings.edu/?s={search_term_string}"},"query-input":{"@type":"PropertyValueSpecification","valueRequired":true,"valueName":"search_term_string"}}],"inLanguage":"en-US"}]}

meta.name: theme-color

span.class: line flex w-full border-t border-skin-hr-primary mb-4

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-5 sm:divide-x divide-skin-hr-secondary gap-0 sm:gap-5 sm:items-stretch

a.span: What price for peace in Ukraine?

img.alt: A mourner holds flowers on Valentine's Day at the Lychakiv Military Cemetery in Lviv, on February 14, 2026, amid the Russian invasion of Ukraine.

span.span: What price for peace in Ukraine?

span.p:
Aslı Aydıntaşbaş, Pavel K. Baev, Mariana Budjeryn, Philip H. Gordon, Anna Grzymała-Busse, Daniel S. Hamilton, Mara Karlin, Steven Pifer, Melanie W. Sisson, Constanze Stelzenmüller, Thomas Wright
+6 more

a.span: From the halls of the Munich Security Conference

img.alt: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio delivers a keynote speech at the 62nd Munich Security Conference on February 14, 2026, in Munich, Germany

span.span: From the halls of the Munich Security Conference

a.span: We asked Americans how they felt about their interracial interactions. The answers may surprise you.

span.span: We asked Americans how they felt about their interracial interactions. The answers may surprise you.

img.alt: The new DF-5C strategic nuclear-capable missiles are seen on trucks, as they are debuted at a military parade marking the 80th anniversary of victory over Japan and the end of World War II, in Tiananmen Square, Beijing, China, September 3, 2025.

span.span: What comes after New START?

a.span: Reduced immigration slowed population growth for the nation and most states, new census data show

img.alt: Newark, New Jersey, USA - April 01, 2025: Diverse group of passengers queuing in an airport customs area in Newark, New Jersey.

span.span: Reduced immigration slowed population growth for the nation and most states, new census data show

div.class: byo-block -wide -wide w-screen about-home theme-dark-blue text-white px-outer py-5 lg:px-outer-lg

div.h3: Brookings’ scholarly research educates the public and informs decisionmakers on complex policy challenges.

div.class: flex flex-col md:border-l md:border-white/20 sm:p-4 py-4 about-col

img.alt: A printed document with charts on top of an open laptop.

div.p: We uphold the highest standards of research quality and professional ethics, bringing evidence-based approaches to complex policy challenges that span the breadth and depth of our scholars’ expertise.

div.class: flex flex-col md:border-l md:border-white/20 sm:p-4 py-4 about-col

img.alt: Brookings expert Landry Signe' at the World Bank/IMF Spring meetings in April 2024

div.p: We bring together leading experts in government, academia, and beyond to provide independent, nonpartisan research and analysis on the most important issues in the world.

div.class: flex flex-col md:border-l md:border-white/20 sm:p-4 py-4 about-col

img.alt: A side view of the capitol building.

div.p: Brookings has been at the forefront of public policy for over 100 years, providing data and insights to inform critical decisions during some of the most important inflection points in recent history.

span.class: line flex w-full border-t border-skin-hr-primary mb-3

a.span: What’s the state of our Union?

img.alt: President Trump, State of the Union speech, 2018

span.span: What’s the state of our Union?

span.p: E.J. Dionne, Jr., Wendy Edelberg, Molly E. Reynolds, Melanie W. Sisson

a.span: Brown Center scholars reflect on education after 1 year of the Trump administration

img.alt: U.S. President Donald Trump signs an executive order in the Oval Office at the White House on April 23, 2025, in Washington, DC. The seven executive orders were related to education policy including enforcing universities to disclose foreign gifts, artificial intelligence education and school disciplinary policies.

span.span: Brown Center scholars reflect on education after 1 year of the Trump administration

span.p: Jon Valant, Kenneth K. Wong, Michael Hansen, Katharine Meyer, Rachel M. Perera

a.span: Assessing President Trump’s second-term staffing record

img.alt: U.S. President Donald Trump speaks during a Cabinet meeting in the Cabinet Room of the White House in Washington, D.C. on Dec. 2, 2025. Also pictured, from left to right: U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr., Secretary of the Interior Doug Burgum, Secretary of State Marco Rubio, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, Secretary of Commerce Howard Lutnick, and Secretary of Transportation Sean Duffy.

span.span: Assessing President Trump’s second-term staffing record

a.span: Making America great again? Evaluating Trump’s China strategy at the one-year mark

img.alt: U.S. President Donald Trump prepares to greet Chinese President Xi Jinping ahead of a bilateral meeting at Gimhae Air Base on October 30, 2025 in Busan, South Korea.

span.span: Making America great again? Evaluating Trump’s China strategy at the one-year mark

a.title: See more on the State of the Union

div.a: See more on the State of the Union

span.class: line flex w-full border-t border-skin-hr-primary mb-3

a.span: How the Big Beautiful Bill hurts the care economy

img.alt: U.S. Speaker of the House Mike Johnson (R-La.) speaks to the media after the House narrowly passed a bill forwarding President Donald Trump's agenda at the U.S. Capitol on May 22, 2025 in Washington, DC. The tax and spending legislation, in what has been called the "Big Beautiful Bill," redirects money to the military and border security and includes cuts to Medicaid, education, and other domestic programs. Johnson was flanked by House Committee Chairmen who helped craft the legislation.

span.span: How the Big Beautiful Bill hurts the care economy

a.span: ICE expansion has outpaced accountability. What are the remedies?

img.alt: ICE agents at house

span.span: ICE expansion has outpaced accountability. What are the remedies?

a.span: What will 2026 bring for US migration policy?

span.span: What will 2026 bring for US migration policy?

a.span: Macroeconomic implications of immigration flows in 2025 and 2026: January 2026 update

img.alt: A US Flag pictured with a US Visa document and US Permanent Resident Card.

span.span: Macroeconomic implications of immigration flows in 2025 and 2026: January 2026 update

span.p: Wendy Edelberg, Stan Veuger, Tara Watson

a.title: See more on Immigration and Migration

div.a: See more on Immigration and Migration

span.class: line flex w-full border-t border-skin-hr-primary mb-3

a.span: Redrawing global boundaries? The United States, China, and the viability of spheres of influence in the 21st century

img.alt: A vector illustration depicts a chess game between the United States and China played over a world map, symbolizing their strategic moves and competition for global influence.

span.span: Redrawing global boundaries? The United States, China, and the viability of spheres of influence in the 21st century

span.p:
William A. Galston, Ryan Hass, Patricia M. Kim, Melanie W. Sisson, Constanze Stelzenmüller, Thomas Wright, Miles Yu
+2 more

a.span: America’s narrative on Taiwan needs an update

img.alt: Containers are seen at the Port of Keelung on April 04, 2025 in Keelung, Taiwan.

span.span: America’s narrative on Taiwan needs an update

a.span: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum is cleaning house and consolidating power

img.alt: Mexico's President Claudia Sheinbaum speaks during her daily press conference at Palacio Nacional in Mexico City on February 12, 2026.

span.span: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum is cleaning house and consolidating power

a.span: Stiffening European sanctions against the Russian oil trade

img.alt: A person watching an oil tanker from the shore.

span.span: Stiffening European sanctions against the Russian oil trade

span.p: Robin Brooks, Kate Davidson, Ben Harris, Harold Hongju Koh, Liam Marshall

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-5 gap-y-6 lg:gap-y-0 items-start
xl:col-span-2 lg:col-span-4 md:col-span-2 promo-content flex flex-col justify-between

div.p: Get our flagship newsletter with research on today's top issues.

div.class: email-and-submit subscribe-form-fields flex flex-col gap-2 grow mt-4 peer

p.class: disclaimer-text inline small text-skin-caption transition-all duration-quicker ease-cubic opacity-0 peer-focus-within:opacity-100 max-h-0 h-full overflow-hidden peer-focus-within:max-h-[999px] peer-focus-within:mt-3 w-[424px] max-w-full mr-24 subscribe-form-fields

AI + work: Building pro-worker AI

div.class: footer-main theme-dark-blue flex flex-col gap-5 px-outer py-5 lg:px-outer-lg lg:py-7
footer-main-cta flex flex-col items-center gap-5 lg:mb-5
footer-main-cta-form gap-4 flex flex-col max-w-full w-md items-center
footer-main-social flex flex-row gap-4 h-5 w-full items-center justify-center
footer-main-content flex flex-wrap justify-between gap-5 md:flex-nowrap
footer-main-content-info flex gap-5 xl:gap-6 sm:w-full md:w-6/12
footer-main-content-info-content md:max-w-sm flex flex-col gap-3 w-full
div.p: Brookings equips decisionmakers with nonpartisan research and policy strategies to create a more prosperous and secure country and world.
